introSection: Wakala is a steel roller coaster located at Bellewaerde in Ypres, West Flanders, Flemish Region, Belgium. Unveiled in January 2020, it opened on 1 July of that year.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Riders are secured by individual lap bars.

fullText:
Wakala is a steel roller coaster located at Bellewaerde in Ypres, West Flanders, Flemish Region, Belgium. Unveiled in January 2020, it opened on 1 July of that year.



Riders are secured by individual lap bars.
